Class MeasurementDTO

java.lang.Object
lcr.beans.MeasurementDTO
public class MeasurementDTO extends Object
Data Transfer Object that encapsulates raw readings, parsed measurement values, and their derived components (resistance, capacitance, inductance, impedance). * @author sylkat

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    MeasurementDTO(String realValueA, String realValueB, String measureType, String typeA, String valueA, String typeB, String valueB, SeriesMode seriesMode, Boolean connected, Map<DerivateResistance, Double> resistanceDerivator, Map<DerivateCapacitance, Double> capacitanceDerivator, Map<DerivateInductance, Double> inductanceDerivator, Map<DerivateImpedance, Double> impedanceDerivator)
    Constructs a complete measurement data transfer object.

  • Constructor Details

    • MeasurementDTO

      public MeasurementDTO(String realValueA, String realValueB, String measureType, String typeA, String valueA, String typeB, String valueB, SeriesMode seriesMode, Boolean connected, Map<DerivateResistance, Double> resistanceDerivator, Map<DerivateCapacitance, Double> capacitanceDerivator, Map<DerivateInductance, Double> inductanceDerivator, Map<DerivateImpedance, Double> impedanceDerivator)
      Constructs a complete measurement data transfer object. * @param realValueA the raw primary value string from the device
      Parameters:
      realValueB - the raw secondary value string from the device
      measureType - the overall measurement type/mode identifier
      typeA - the unit or label type for the primary reading
      valueA - the formatted primary reading value
      typeB - the unit or label type for the secondary reading
      valueB - the formatted secondary reading value
      seriesMode - the circuit mode configuration (Series/Parallel)
      connected - the connection status flag of the device
      resistanceDerivator - mapped derived resistance calculations
      capacitanceDerivator - mapped derived capacitance calculations
      inductanceDerivator - mapped derived inductance calculations
      impedanceDerivator - mapped derived impedance calculations
